item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Funeral Cost Transparency
item.description:
👀 Funeral Cost Transparency

What

Federal funeral cost transparency in the 119th Congress modernizing the FTC Funeral Rule for online and at-need price-disclosure.

What it does

  • Online price-list requirement · package-decomposition standards · FTC enforcement modernization · cooperative-class funeral-services provisions.

Composes

#5 The Family Table (end-of-life Trust Graph) · Older Americans Act Reauthorization.

🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
